g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does PlugX use a .lnk file as an initial access vector?')
sendPrompt('What does the PowerShell stage in PlugX do?')
g.text: Spawned by LNK target — LOLBin execution, AMSI bypass
Stage 3 — three files dropped to disk

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the legitimate .exe used in PlugX DLL side-loading?')
sendPrompt('What does the malicious .dll do in PlugX DLL side-loading?')

sendPrompt('How does PlugX execute the .dat file as shellcode in memory?')
sendPrompt('How does PlugX decrypt its core DLL in memory?')
g.text: XOR / bitmask loop strips ciphertext → raw PE image
Manual PE map: fix relocations, resolve imports via PEB

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does PlugX establish persistence on the infected host?')
